title: MSM
description: Methylsulfonylmethane (MSM) is an organosulfur compound naturally found in plants and animals that serves as a source of bioavailable sulfur. It functions primarily as an anti-inflammatory agent by modulating inflammatory pathways and oxidative stress, while also supporting collagen synthesis and joint tissue health. MSM is commonly used as a dietary supplement for joint pain, osteoarthritis, skin health, and general inflammation reduction.

research.title: Methylsulfonylmethane: Applications and Safety of a Novel Dietary Supplement
research.summary: Comprehensive review found MSM improves inflammation, joint/muscle pain, oxidative stress, and antioxidant capacity, with dosages up to 4 grams daily being well-tolerated with few side effects.

research.title: Methylsulfonylmethane (MSM), an organosulfur compound, is effective against obesity-induced metabolic disorders in mice
research.summary: Animal study demonstrated MSM's effectiveness in reducing metabolic disorders associated with obesity through anti-inflammatory mechanisms.

research.title: Efficacy and safety of a supplement combination on hand pain among people with symptomatic hand osteoarthritis
research.summary: Clinical trial evaluated MSM as part of a supplement combination for hand osteoarthritis pain relief in patients with symptomatic joint disease.

research.title: Efficacy of dietary supplements for treating knee osteoarthritis: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
research.summary: Network meta-analysis comparing various dietary supplements including MSM for knee osteoarthritis found potential benefits for pain reduction and joint function improvement.

research.title: Nail Supplements: When, How, and Why?
research.summary: Review found that MSM along with biotin, collagen peptides, and other supplements can improve nail clinical appearance, strength, and reduce brittleness.

research.title: Methyl-sulfonyl-methane (MSM)-induced acute angle closure
research.summary: Case report of a rare adverse event where MSM supplementation was associated with bilateral acute angle closure glaucoma that resolved after discontinuation.

research.title: Methylsulfonylmethane sensitizes endometrial cancer cells to doxorubicin
research.summary: Laboratory study found MSM can enhance the effectiveness of chemotherapy drug doxorubicin in endometrial cancer cells by inducing apoptosis.

sentiment.summary: Users report consistently positive experiences with MSM, particularly for joint pain relief, hair and nail growth, and skin improvements. The majority describe long-lasting benefits even after discontinuation, with minimal side effects when properly hydrated.

effects.label: Joint Support:
effects.description: Highly effective for joint pain and osteoarthritis, particularly when combined with glucosamine, chondroitin, and collagen supplements

effects.label: Long-lasting Results:
effects.description: Many users report that benefits to joints persist for years after discontinuing MSM, suggesting potential structural improvements

effects.label: Hair and Beauty:
effects.description: Consistently effective for cosmetic benefits including hair growth, nail strength, and skin health, typically noticeable within 2-4 weeks

effects.label: Individual Variation:
effects.description: Some users experience no benefits or gastrointestinal issues, while others report dramatic improvements, suggesting genetic or metabolic variation in response

dosage.label: Standard Dose:
dosage.description: 1000mg daily is commonly used and effective for joint pain and general health benefits

dosage.label: High Dose:
dosage.description: Some users take up to 10g daily for more severe joint issues, though this requires increased water intake to prevent headaches

dosage.label: Timing:
dosage.description: Often taken once daily in the morning, with vitamin C recommended to assist absorption

dosage.label: With Food:
dosage.description: Can be taken with or without food, though some users prefer taking it with meals to reduce potential stomach upset

sideEffects.label: Gastrointestinal Issues:
sideEffects.description: Some users experience bloating, gas, or stomach upset, though others report MSM actually calms their gut

sideEffects.label: Excessive Thirst:
sideEffects.description: Higher doses (10g+) cause intense thirst and dry mouth, requiring significantly increased water intake

sideEffects.label: Unwanted Hair Growth:
sideEffects.description: Some users report increased hair growth in unexpected areas including face, torso, and stomach

sideEffects.label: Rare Reactions:
sideEffects.description: Isolated case reports of acute angle closure glaucoma in susceptible individuals, though this is extremely uncommon

availability.label: Widely Available:
availability.description: MSM is readily available over-the-counter at health stores, online retailers, and pharmacies at affordable prices

availability.label: GRAS Status:
availability.description: Recognized as Generally Recognized As Safe by regulatory authorities, with dosages up to 4g daily considered safe for most individuals

availability.label: Combination Products:
availability.description: Frequently sold in combination with glucosamine, chondroitin, and hyaluronic acid for joint health formulations
